name: Southwestern Beef and Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Salt pork, cut into cubes
1 lb Lean chuck steak, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in water overnight.
2. Brown the salt pork in a skillet or slow-cooking pot until browned.
3. In a slow-cooking pot, combine the soaked beans (with water), browned pork, and remaining ingredients.
4. Cover and cook on low for 9 to 10 hours.
